_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: Recombinant K-Ras WT, K-Ras T50I, oncogenic K-Ras G12D, and K-Ras G12D,T50I proteins (residues 1–169) were generated
details: Used to generate recombinant K-Ras WT, K-Ras T50I, oncogenic K-Ras G12D, and K-Ras G12D,T50I proteins (residues 1–169)
